---
title: "Module_Seg"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(bruceR)
setwd("D:/youyi_fucha/code/")
#data_all <- import("all_metric_data_sub.csv")
#all_info_data <- import("first_all_subjects_info.xlsx")
#data_all <- rename(data_all, participant = subname)
#data_merge <- inner_join(data_all, all_info_data, by = c("group", "participant"))
#export(data_merge,'data_merge_FC_seg_integ.xlsx')

#data_merge <- inner_join(data_all, all_info_data, by = c("group", "participant")) %>%
#  pivot_longer(cols = c(1:50), names_to = "Metrics", values_to = "Degree") %>%
#  # 计算BMI (BMI = weight(kg) / height(m)^2)
#  mutate(BMI = weight / (tall/100)^2)
data_merge <-  import("data_merge_FC_seg_integ.xlsx")%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(1:50), names_to = "Metrics", values_to = "Degree") %>%
  # 计算BMI (BMI = weight(kg) / height(m)^2)
  mutate(BMI = weight / (tall/100)^2)
# 设置随机种子确保结果可重复
set.seed(123)

# 获取所有独特的指标
unique_metrics <- unique(data_merge$Metrics)

# 创建空的结果数据框
linear_model_results <- data.frame(
  Metrics = character(),
  group_coef = numeric(),
  group_se = numeric(),
  group_t = numeric(),
  group_p = numeric(),
  r_squared = numeric(),
  adj_r_squared = numeric(),
  f_statistic = numeric(),
  model_p = numeric(),
  n_obs = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 使用for循环处理每个指标
for(i in 1:length(unique_metrics)) {
  
  current_metric <- unique_metrics[i]
  
  # 筛选当前指标的数据
  current_data <- data_merge %>%
    filter(Metrics == current_metric) %>%
    # 去除缺失值
    filter(!is.na(Degree))
  
  # 检查是否有足够的数据进行分析
  if(nrow(current_data) < 10) {
    cat("警告: 指标", current_metric, "的有效数据点少于10个，跳过分析\n")
    next
  }
  
  # 去除异常值（使用IQR方法）
  Q1 <- quantile(current_data$Degree, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(current_data$Degree, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  IQR <- Q3 - Q1
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
  
  # 过滤异常值
  current_data_clean <- current_data %>%
    filter(Degree >= lower_bound & Degree <= upper_bound)
  
  # 检查清理后是否还有足够的数据
  if(nrow(current_data_clean) < 10) {
    cat("警告: 指标", current_metric, "去除异常值后数据点少于10个，跳过分析\n")
    next
  }
  
  # 拟合线性模型
  tryCatch({
    model <- lm(Degree ~ group+years+education+BMI, data = current_data)
    model_summary <- summary(model)
    
    # 检查group系数是否存在
    if("groupSUB" %in% rownames(model_summary$coefficients)) {
      # 提取group的系数信息
      group_coef <- model_summary$coefficients["groupSUB", "Estimate"]
      group_se <- model_summary$coefficients["groupSUB", "Std. Error"]
      group_t <- model_summary$coefficients["groupSUB", "t value"]
      group_p <- model_summary$coefficients["groupSUB", "Pr(>|t|)"]
      
      # 提取模型整体信息
      r_squared <- model_summary$r.squared
      adj_r_squared <- model_summary$adj.r.squared
      f_statistic <- model_summary$fstatistic[1]
      model_p <- pf(model_summary$fstatistic[1], 
                    model_summary$fstatistic[2], 
                    model_summary$fstatistic[3], 
                    lower.tail = FALSE)
      n_obs <- nobs(model)
      
      # 将结果添加到结果数据框
      linear_model_results <- rbind(linear_model_results, data.frame(
        Metrics = current_metric,
        group_coef = group_coef,
        group_se = group_se,
        group_t = group_t,
        group_p = group_p,
        r_squared = r_squared,
        adj_r_squared = adj_r_squared,
        f_statistic = f_statistic,
        model_p = model_p,
        n_obs = n_obs,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
      
      cat("完成指标", i, "/", length(unique_metrics), ":", current_metric, 
          "- p值:", round(group_p, 4), "\n")
    } else {
      cat("警告: 指标", current_metric, "的模型中没有group系数\n")
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("错误: 指标", current_metric, "模型拟合失败:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# 进行FDR校正和添加显著性标记
linear_model_results <- linear_model_results %>%
  mutate(
    group_p_fdr = p.adjust(group_p, method = "BH"),
    # 添加显著性标记（未校正）
    significance = case_when(
      group_p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      group_p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      group_p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    # 添加显著性标记（FDR校正后）
    significance_fdr = case_when(
      group_p_fdr < 0.001 ~ "***",
      group_p_fdr < 0.01  ~ "**",
      group_p_fdr < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  # 按p值排序
  arrange(group_p)

# 查看结果
print(linear_model_results)

# 筛选出显著的组间差异（未校正）
significant_metrics <- linear_model_results %>%
  filter(group_p < 0.05) %>%
  select(Metrics, group_coef, group_p, significance)

cat("\n显著的组间差异指标（未校正）:\n")
print(significant_metrics)

# 筛选出FDR校正后显著的组间差异
significant_metrics_fdr <- linear_model_results %>%
  filter(group_p_fdr < 0.05) %>%
  select(Metrics, group_coef, group_p, group_p_fdr, significance_fdr)



cat("\nFDR校正后显著的组间差异指标:\n")
print(significant_metrics_fdr)

# 保存结果
write.csv(linear_model_results, "linear_model_group_effects_BMI.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(significant_metrics_fdr, "significant_group_differences_fdr_BMI.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 创建可视化
library(ggplot2)

# 火山图显示效应大小和显著性
volcano_plot <- linear_model_results %>%
  mutate(
    log10_p = -log10(group_p),
    significant_group = case_when(
      group_p_fdr < 0.05 & group_coef > 0 ~ "显著上调",
      group_p_fdr < 0.05 & group_coef < 0 ~ "显著下调",
      TRUE ~ "不显著"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = group_coef, y = log10_p, color = significant_group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("显著上调" = "#E31A1C", 
                                "显著下调" = "#1F78B4", 
                                "不显著" = "grey60")) +
  labs(x = "组间效应大小 (回归系数)", 
       y = "-log10(p值)",
       title = "组间差异火山图 (控制education, years, BMI)",
       color = "显著性类别") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

print(volcano_plot)

# 显示总结信息
cat("\n=== 分析总结 ===\n")
cat("总共分析了", nrow(linear_model_results), "个指标\n")
cat("未校正时显著的指标数:", sum(linear_model_results$group_p < 0.05), "\n")
cat("FDR校正后显著的指标数:", sum(linear_model_results$group_p_fdr < 0.05), "\n")
cat("协变量: education, years, BMI\n")
```


```{r}
for (Metricname in significant_metrics_fdr$Metrics) {
    
    data_select <- data_merge %>% filter(Metrics==Metricname)
    Q1 <- quantile(data_select$Degree, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    Q3 <- quantile(data_select$Degree, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    IQR <- Q3 - Q1
    lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
    upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
    
    # 过滤异常值
    data_select_clean <- data_select %>%
      filter(Degree >= lower_bound & Degree <= upper_bound)
    
    data_select_clean %>%  ggplot( aes(x = group, y = Degree,fill = group,color=group)) +
    geom_boxplot(color="grey30",width=0.2,position = position_nudge(x=-0.2),alpha=0.8)+
    PupillometryR::geom_flat_violin(color="white",position = position_nudge(x=0),alpha=0.8)+
    geom_point(color="grey60",shape=19,size=3.2,
               position = position_jitter(width = 0.1),alpha=0.3)+
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = "Group", y = Metricname)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#e88936", "#619bc1")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#e88936", "#619bc1"))+
    theme_classic()+
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )-> figure_metric
    ggsave(
    filename = paste0(Metricname,"_Groupdiff.pdf"),
    plot = figure_metric,
    width = 4,
    height = 5
)
}
```



# below analysis were dropped in final paper.
```{r}
data_merge <- inner_join(data_all, all_info_data, by = c("group", "participant")) %>% dplyr::select(c(significant_metrics_fdr$Metrics,names(all_info_data)[11:20],"group","years","education"))
data_merge %>% export("D:/youyi_fucha/code/Segregation_Integeration_datainfo.xlsx")

data_merge_clean <- data_merge %>% filter(Deafualt_S_all>0.4) # excluded the outlier
GLM_summary(lm(EAT_26~Deafualt_S_all*group,data_merge_clean))
interactions::sim_slopes(lm(EAT_26~Deafualt_S_all*group,data_merge_clean),pred = "Deafualt_S_all",modx = "group")
```


```{r}
data_merge %>% ggplot(aes(x=Deafualt_S_all, EAT_26,group = group,color=group))+geom_point(size = 5,aes(shape=group))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+theme_classic(base_size = 20)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#e88936", "#619bc1")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#e88936", "#619bc1"))
```


```{r}
data_merge %>% ggplot(aes(x=Deafualt_S_all, EAT_26))+geom_point(size = 5,aes(shape=group))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+theme_classic(base_size = 20)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#e88936")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#e88936"))
```
